mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.name, e.created_at, e.deleted_at FROM equipments e JOIN venue_equipment_map vem ON e.id = vem.equipment_id WHERE vem.venue_id = #{venueId} AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY e.id ASC

SELECT v.id AS venueId, v.name AS venueName, e.id AS equipmentId, e.name AS equipmentName, vem.quantity, false AS isInUse FROM equipments e JOIN venue_equipment_map vem ON e.id = vem.equipment_id JOIN venues v ON vem.venue_id = v.id WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY v.id ASC, e.id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking_equipment be JOIN bookings b ON be.booking_id = b.id WHERE be.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND b.status IN (1, 2) AND b.booking_date = #{today} AND ((b.time_slots >> #{currentHour}) & 1) = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipments (name, created_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{createdAt}, #{deletedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking_equipment be JOIN bookings b ON be.booking_id = b.id WHERE be.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND b.status IN (1, 2)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO venue_equipment_map (venue_id, equipment_id, quantity) VALUES (#{venueId}, #{equipmentId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT be.id) FROM booking_equipment be JOIN bookings b ON be.booking_id = b.id JOIN equipments e ON be.equipment_id = e.id JOIN venues v ON b.venue_id = v.id WHERE b.status = 2 AND e.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT b.venue_id AS venueId, v.name AS venueName, e.id AS equipmentId, e.name AS equipmentName, b.booking_date AS borrowDate, b.time_slots AS timeSlots, b.purpose FROM booking_equipment be JOIN bookings b ON be.booking_id = b.id JOIN equipments e ON be.equipment_id = e.id JOIN venues v ON b.venue_id = v.id WHERE b.status = 2 AND e.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.booking_date DESC, b.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
